regions.text: Vending machines sell many things automatically in public places, from food to books.
(Diagram: Using a vending machine). Automating buying and selling makes life simpler.
Shopping can take up too much time. Self-service frees people from waiting in line. (Illustration: People shopping together).
shop/store: place to buy things. FUTURE: will shop. PRESENT: shop(s). PAST: shopped.
